rationale: clauses: rendered doc embeds revision history(KILLED: exact data row asserted in render; loop tamper {%- -> {% kills via source assertion), from repository data(KILLED: history.yml author 'Example Author'->'Someone Else' changes the render and fails the row assertion - proves data flows to output), not a hand-maintained table(KILLED: replacing the whole jinja loop with a literal table row fails the source-contains-loop assertion).
